stocks.impact_theory: GE Vernova reported blowout Q1 earnings with EPS $17.44 vs $2 est, revenue $9.34B vs $9.26B est, raised FY guidance, massive $20B backlog from AI data center power demand. Economic implications: accelerates energy transition, boosts infrastructure spend. Market psychology: FOMO on AI/power play, historical parallel to 2021 semis boom. Analogies: like Cisco in dotcom for networking, or NVDA now for power.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings crush, guidance raise amid AI energy surge; X sentiment exploding positive (posts on beats, orders); web news highlights backlog, up 8% premarket.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15-20% gains on continued AI tailwinds
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if macro slowdown
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overheating valuation, supply chain for turbines, competition from Siemens.

stocks.justification: Massive beat, structural demand from AI data centers, strong X/web sentiment.

Implications: stabilizes cash flow, backlog intact. Psychology: relief rally after woes. Parallels: post-737 crisis recovery. Analogies: like airline post-9/11 rebound, or Airbus rival gains.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Beat expectations amid ceasefire positivity for aviation; positive premarket +4%; X mentions up on results.
